title: wolffia borealis
intro: Wolffia borealis, also known as duckweed, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Lemnaceae family and is one of the smallest flowering plants in the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Wolffia borealis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Wolffia borealis is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and is sometimes used in combination with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
